info.title: STT Server API
info.description: Speech-to-Text Server mit Transkription, Sprechererkennung und Zusammenfassung

get.description: List and create storage backend configurations.

post.description: List and create storage backend configurations.

get.description: Retrieve, update, and delete a storage backend configuration.

put.description: Retrieve, update, and delete a storage backend configuration.

delete.description: Retrieve, update, and delete a storage backend configuration.

post.description: Upload an audio file and create an async job. Poll GET /v1/jobs/{id} for status and results.

patch.description: Update result fields and create a versioned snapshot.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a job, its versions, and related audit logs.

post.description: Re-run structure and/or summarize on the current result text. Creates a versioned snapshot of the new results.

get.description: List all versioned snapshots of a job's results.

delete.description: Permanently deletes all jobs, versions, and audit logs belonging to the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns all jobs, result versions, and audit log entries belonging to the authenticated user in a portable JSON format.

DataExportJob.description: Job data included in GDPR data export.

PatchedJobUpdate.description: Input for correcting job result fields.

Reprocess.description: Input for selecting which steps to re-run.

steps.description: Pipeline steps to re-run on current result text

source.description: How this version was created: pipeline, correction, reprocess

StorageConfig.description:
Serializer for StorageConfig CRUD operations.

s3_secret_key is write-only — never returned in API responses.

is_default.description: Use as default storage for new jobs

base_path.description: Base path / prefix for stored files

encrypt_at_rest.description: Encrypt stored files with AES-256-GCM before writing
